public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hazard reader.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a hazard reader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hazard reader in and around Amber Tides River, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Amber Tides River workable through the obligations of hazard reader while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Amber Tides River, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of hazard reader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vera Hart can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Vera Hart needs help with a problem in Amber Tides River that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Vera Hart carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Amber Tides River: the part of Amber Tides River where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
